de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessAssociationValueContainer

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessAssociationValueContainer
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer, ISymbolicElement
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessObject, SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessState
    Enclosing class:
    SymbolicLayoutReader

    public abstract static class SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessAssociationValueContainer
extends SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessElement
implements ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer
    An implementation of ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
